config_template.output_tensor: optional; pass input tensor for in-place execution

applicability_notes: Stochastic op: per-call seed must vary across invocations (test increments seed each call). Supports in-place via output_tensor=input. Variance of realized drop ratio is high; only mean tracks probability (rtol~0.02 over 1000 trials). No golden registered; not bit-matchable against torch due to RNG differences.; torch_pattern_source: derived from unit test semantics: output zeroes fraction `prob` of elements (mean zero-ratio asserted ~= prob) and applies scale=1.0/(1.0-prob), matching F.dropout train-mode behavior

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(t, device=device, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config
unit test: output_tensor=tensor (in-place) — output aliases input buffer/placement
